trait.confidence_notes: GWAS is sex-combined; dosage-compensation assumptions are not explicit.
trait.category: Biological samples > Assay results > Blood assays > Blood count
trait.description_more: Result of "Lymphocytes Percentage" assay, performed on blood sample, obtained from UK Biobank assessment centre visit. Lymphocytes (Percentage) is calculated as the proportion of lymphocytes in the leukocytes.
